lines.hearsay: There were two voices going over the same page at {place}, again and again.
lines.gossip: {A} put the ledger in front of {B} at {place} and asked {B} to find the entry {A} had already found — {B} did not look down, and {A} did not put it away, and that is how the Brays have their arguments: nobody wins, and only one of them sleeps fine after.
lines.report: {A} contested {B}'s entry in the shop accounts at {place}, slot {slot}.
